{{Quote|Confirmation from admiral Mulleen -- the officers suspected of anti-Imperial sentiments have been rounded up and eliminated.|Sate Pestage reports Mulleen's success to Galactic Emperor Palpatine|<ref name="DT:PTN" />}}
'''Mulleen''' served in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and declared his allegiance to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] successor state, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], upon its formation<ref name="SW:CE" /> in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. One [[Standard month/Legends|month]] after the declaration of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], he held the rank of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]<ref name="DT:PTN" /> and had been put in command of the [[Emperor's purge|elimination]] of all [[Imperial officer/Legends|officers]] suspected of disloyalty. He carried out the task with ruthless efficiency and had executed a huge number of detractors within a few months of the [[Battle of Utapau/Legends|Battle of Utapau]],<ref name="SW:CE" /> one of the final battles in the Clone Wars.<ref name="SW:ROTS">{{Film|III}}</ref> Once Mulleen had completed the executions, he reported it to the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] aide, [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]], who in turn reported it to the Emperor himself.<ref name="DT:PTN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Mulleen was first mentioned in the [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series ''[[Star Wars: Dark Times]]'' in the [[Dark Times 1|first issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Dark Times: The Path to Nowhere|''The Path to Nowhere'']] story arc published on [[November 8]], [[2006]]. The comic was written by [[Randy Stradley]], under the name Mike Harrison.<ref name="DT:PTN" />
